examples: He sets out the facts coolly and dispassionately.
When an arguer argues dispassionately he thinks only of the argument.
I hope to equip you with the tools to do this effectively and dispassionately.
After having an emotional outburst, you can temporarily lose trust in yourself to communicate dispassionately.
So here are the questions: Can a justice have empathy and still rule dispassionately on the law?
